channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 142 replies — 568.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 142 • Updated: 2026-04-28 22:59 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62164812
>>62158557
I was going to say Neet is worse but dealing with people is hell so I'm going to say Wagie. Having money is nice but I rather not splurge than have stupid coworkers and customers take advantage of you because you're trying to keep your job.

62164866
>me doing whatever I want all day because I have no job

62164928
>>62158601
Fact check: most wagies don't have the time or the money to go out and have fun and socialize.

62165024
Both sides in this thread are coping a bit.
NEET feels like freedom at first but for most people it turns into stagnation unless you're extremely self-directed. You lose structure, your sense of time gets weird, and eventually nothing feels that rewarding.
Wagie life sucks in a different way (routine, low autonomy, sometimes humiliation) but it gives you money, exposure to people, and at least some structure.
NEET + no direction = decay
Wagie + no progression = slow trap
NEET + discipline (learning, building, training) = rare but viable
Wagie + skill-building / saving = actually opens options over time
Most people in this thread are arguing about comfort vs discomfort, not outcomes.
Also: if you're the type who does nothing with your free time while working you're not suddenly going to become productive as a NEET. It usually gets worse, not better.
If you care about long-term quality of life, the question is: are you gaining leverage (skills, money, options) or just maintaining your current state?
Everything else is just preference and coping.

62165089
>>62158557
>wagie or a NEET
wagie because you can find yourself surround by negative people for a while
but they're both the worst with a bad mindset desu

62165090
>>62164928
False. Because most people in society are wagies, socializing happens during the same 5pm-2am time frame. It's why being a neet sucks because none of your friends are available as they are working and you can only hangout with them when they are done work which defeats the whole point of you not working.
>>62165024
This.

62165202
>>62165024
Literally ChatGPT written. Also, you aren’t developing fucking skills at your call center job or flipping beef patties. None of those open any options for you and are time sink. Jobs also don’t change your sense of time, all a job does is make you adhere to a schedule and some schedules are fucked up so it’s the same as NEETING. The wealth is concentrated at the top and most of the rich today inherited wealth they did NOT work for it AT ALL. Get that thru your fucking head. You are labor and no laborer ends up like Trump or Musk. Most labor ends up back broken and tossed aside later in life. 50% of all baby boomers are broke and destitute that’s proof enough waging isn’t the correct path

62165417
>>62158557
Waging is worse. The problem with waging is that most jobs are full time with a pitiful allotment of days off.
Like seriously, I get 4 weeks of personal leave a year. That amounts to a couple of 2 week holidays in a year, just fucking nothing. Its such a small amount of time I cant even stand to use it because im psychologically cucked knowing im going to be counting down those days before i have to get back to work again. And then when i get back to work, I will have fewer days left in the bank and the despair will set in further.
Being a neet was being a loser with no hope but at least you can put yourself in a state of mild contentment through trivial entertainment.
Being a wagie is a state of joylessness, boredom and stress. And then you're so time poor you cant enjoy anything in between so the money is irrelevant.
Waging is below me as a human being. I can work, I can feel fulfilled overcoming challenges and building towards things. But i can not, and will not hold up the merits of doing a constant stream of unending tasks 8 hours a day, 5 days a week. There is not a life for a conscious human.

62165497
>>62158557
Wagie. Dealing with normgroids sucks donkey penis.

62165528
The unfortunate truth is that being a NEET is basically the ultimate way of fucking yourself over, unless big inheritance is guaranteed. There's no way of putting into words how fucked a ~30 year old NEET is whose parents are getting up there in age and aren't wealthy. Even if you were in your early twenties, if you've been a NEET for even just a few years you have fucked yourself over massively.

It might not seem that way when you're sitting in your comfy room with electricity and food and bills getting paid for by someone else, but one day, that someone else will be gone. The lights will dim, that person won't be there to give you food or buy you things anymore, and there will be silence. And you'll be alone. And all those years you spent thinking "haha, those wagies are such cucks!" and "idc what happens to me I'll just rope doomer patrick bateman perfect girl edit slowed extended" won't have meant anything. Reality will hit you like the Malaysian Airlines flight 370 Boeing 777 hit the Indian Ocean doing a full speed nosedive. You will realize that you have lived over 1/4th of your life and you haven't begun a career and you have nothing to show for yourself, meanwhile young twenty something are working towards their masters degrees or already working salary jobs. And you'll realize something absolutely catastrophic: you CAN'T rope. You can't do it. There really is no escape, you are only now realizing that you can't bring yourself to do it. You don't have to die to go to hell, you just have to live your life as a NEET.

62165968
>>62165528
>tl:dr wageoid seething
Kys retard.

62166001
>>62165528
>muh show for yourself normoid perspective
Kek. That doesn't matter. The big problem is that there's only so much good anime to watch and games to play. You run out of quality entertainment VERY quickly, and you'll start losing your mind playing MOBA trash or watching moeshit, or being a prominent member of a niche online community, and your days will be filled with nostalgia about enjoying things from years and years ago, now that's a fate worse than death.

62166058
what if the neet is a wagie? he’s just paid a very low wage by society to keep to himself.

62166183
>>62158557
wagie. if your a NEET you can be either a bum or retired but if you're a wagie the majority of your day belongs to making someone else rich

62166519
>>62164486
Are you that dude who made a BSC coin in 2021

62166566
>>62165528
That's what I used to feel when I was neeting in my early twenties
I still deal with the horrible life choice today, I'm far behind anyone else in savings, I still haven't bought a car (i refuse to finance one), I lost so many fucking years of compounding interest, I'm gonna graduate at fucking 26 with a bachelor, or 28 with a master which is pathetic it hurts, and I work part to almost full time at a min wage job just to make due to the amount of years I've spent doing nothing as a useless, worthless wreck

62166578
>>62166566
no one in their 20s owns a car unless it's a 5k beater or their family gives them one. do you want to be like the cattle or realize the way out?

62166715
>>62165528
Imagine being a NEET in a country with zero tolerance for NEETs


Like Japan or South Korea

62166748
>>62165528
NEETs use inheritance to live extremely low-cost lives. It's quite doable in the modern world. The wagie trap is having a family that consumes resources like crazy, and also having status aspirations. Cut those things and you can live a nice cheap life. You have the internet for at-home entertainment and you can just exercise, meditate, learn to cook, chill with friends, etc.

62166810
>>62166578
That's just so not true. There are a fair amount of people graduating college and getting 60-80k per year jobs and getting a 2021 or newer corolla with ther 6 years of part time savings (part time summer jobs from junior year of highschool until college graduation). And those are just the 23-25 year olds not to mention the ones in their later 20's with actual savings from their full time adult jobs. That anon is right he is slightly behind but because he knows he is behind and is working hard to fix it he will likely be fine in 5-10 years since he knows his mistakes. You on the otherhand live in a fairytale world where "everyone my age with money got it from mommy". Nope. Sorry bud. Some people are skilled and actually have good jobs.

62167025
>>62165090
>being a neet sucks
Says the wagie

62167068
Have any of you started a "business" so you can pretend to your family that you have a job?

62167143
>>62167068
Yeah me. I tell them I run a hedge fund.

62167147
If you can make it to 40-50 as a NEET you have already won the lottery of life. But if you really want to live to be 75+ and retire into a nursing home then you have to work.

62167346
>>62167147
Retire in to a nursing home? What? lol

62167389
>>62167147
https://reddit.com/r/NEET/comments/ifcblr/today_i_became_a_40_year_old_virgin_neet_some/

62167410
>>62158557

62167440
>>62158601
>Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.


You're a robot born to entertain themselves to death while feeding the capitalist system. You're less than human

62167526
>>62167025
read my first post itt, i was a neet for 3 years

62167534
>>62167526
I have been neet my whole life. How about you?

item.title: AHEM! Please can I get your attention? *Tink tink tink* Hello? *Tink tink tink* — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
AHEM! Please can I get your attention? *Tink tink tink* Hello? *Tink tink tink*

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-04-28 23:00 UTC

OP

AHEM!
Please can I get your attention?
*Tink tink tink*
Hello?
*Tink tink tink*

Early replies (first 3)

62167162
>>62167155
I'm all ears, you big beautiful faggot. What is it?

62167163
What? What is it? I was jacking off you know...

62167164
Is this the import announcement thread?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167215
>>62167155

62167231
>>62167155
You have the floor, good sir.

62167239
>>62167155
Y-yes?

62167256
Thank you for your attention.
I have an very important announcement to make.
*Cough,cough*

62167285
>>62167256
Well, go ahead chap, don't be shy, what is it?

62167307
>>62167256
Say what you want to say you fucking bloody bitch bastard

62167315
>>62167307
Sir I’m going to have to ask you to leave this is a strictly no Indian meeting

62167393
>>62167155
Good evening gentlemen
*takes a seat*

62167418
This is OP

XRP AND LTC ARE PUMPING

62167500
>>62167155
We know, your mother just found out your gay

62167513
>>62167418
Security! Please! Someone let a retard inside. Remove him from the premises, will you?

62167523
>>62167256
c'mon spill the beans, faggot
>>62167307
>>62167418
>>62167500
get outta here, tardfags

62167541
>>62167155
Yes? What is it, wolf?

item.title: >as soon as staking arrives, its over for you hoes >as soon as CCIP arrives, its over for you hoes >as soon as staking V… — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>as soon as staking arrives, its over for you hoes >as soon as CCIP arrives, its over for you hoes >as soon as staking V…

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-28 23:03 UTC

OP

>as soon as staking arrives, its over for you hoes
>as soon as CCIP arrives, its over for you hoes
>as soon as staking V2 arrives, its over for you hoes
>as soon as Sergey stops farting in the dev room, it's over for you hoes
>as soon as Sergey meets with the US Government, it's over for you hoes
>as soon as SmartCon 2023,2025,2026 happens, it's over for you hoes
>as soon as Chainlink reveals all of its bank partnerships, its over for you hoes
>as soon as Chainlink reveals its Swift partnership, it's over for you hoes
>*you are here*
>as soon as Clarity act is passed it's over for you hoes

When are you going to face the music anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62165492
When pajeets stop getting paid to FUD link

62165537
hating stinks. it's simply what we do

62165544
>>62165480
not selling tho

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165579
Chainlink is LITERALLY a cuckold club, they brag about all the money they lost over the past 6 years

62165755
>>62165480
Who are you even fudding to? Theres like 3 people left here and none of them are selling lol

62166064
>>62165480
Reminder adem was right. He won

62166087
>>62165755
if we get even 1 newcomer here to eschew link, we can die happy knowing our lives were not in vain

62166644
>it has been 5 months since sergey's last appearance

WHAT HAPPENED

62166905
>>62166644
he's stuck in the booth again. he's getting fed though, don't worry

62166996
>>62166064
>He won
only took him 7 years of daily posting

62167236
>>62165480
Staking still hasn’t arrived by the way. The community staking pool is a joke. Its not securing the network if it cant be slashed

62167246
>>62167236
this. stinkies demand the ability for their stakes to be slashed for any reason at a moment's notice :}

62167530
>>62166644
Hes busy on epstein island

62167553
>>62166644
The CTO of SWIFT stepped down. He was literally THE breadcrumb guy. Without him to vague post about some stupid yaml format for making cross chain settlements all we have now is just AI babble and staking 1.0.v1beta1. we're crumbless now bros...

item.title: GO UP YOU PIECE OF SHIT — 7 replies — 28.0/hr

GO UP YOU PIECE OF SHIT

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-28 23:02 UTC

OP

IT'S SAT AT 55.55 FOR LIKE AN HOUR NOW

GO UP YOU FUCKER

Early replies (first 3)

62167243
>>62167219
BUY THIS SHIT YOU BLOODY SHIT BASTERDS

62167290
55.57

WAGMI BOYS

62167335
Imagine investing on a one hour timeframe.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167340
>>62167335
Fuck you it's going up

62167409
>>62167219
This shit might be the slowest moving coin

62167447
>>62167409
Im balls deep in a long and all I need you to do it buy my bags

62167549
>>62167447
What's your position? I already own a bunch so I can only dump on ya anon

item.title: JUST A SMALL TOWN GOY DEALING IN THE REALLLLL WORLLDDDDDDDd — 6 replies — 24.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-28 23:01 UTC

OP

DEALING IN THE REALLLLL WORLLDDDDDDDd

Early replies (first 3)

62166732
>>62166662
kek

62167264
>>62166662
lol

get a good paying job (130k+) and dealing in the real world becomes fine

62167438
>>62166662
>He took the midnight train going to the (goy)slop

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167460
>>62167438
funnier:
>HE TOOK THE MIDNIGHT TRAIN TO THE WAGEEEEE CAGEEEEEEEEE

62167505
>>62167460

>HE TOOK THE MEAGER WAGE JUST TO STAY ALIVEEEEEEEEEE

62167543
SOME WILL WIN
SOME WILL LOSE
ALL WERE BORN TO SERVE THE JEWS
OVER PINK FIELDS WE'LL SPILL OUR TEARS
IT GOES ON AND ON AND ON AND ON

item.title: Is there any degree more cucked than mechanical engineering? — 45 replies — 89.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is there any degree more cucked than mechanical engineering?

Open thread • Replies: 45 • Updated: 2026-04-28 22:41 UTC

OP

>be Cole Allen attempted assassin
>Study ME at Big Bang Theory school
>“He didn’t have to study. It would just come to him. He was really, really smart.”
>bright future and prestigious job at NASA
>Get shit salary because Mechanical Engineering
>End up tutoring kids
>watch friends from college become millionaires in SWE and EE
>watch product managers, tech sales and bullshit day in the life demoralization videos
>fomo into Masters in Comp Sci
>missed the last train out and AI and outsourcing kills job market
>write a delusional reddit bro manifesto

Another victim of Mechanical Engineering

Early replies (first 3)

62166304
>>62166266
Trade jobs

62166333
>>62166266
XRP holders

My 75 year old, pilled out, alzheimers father has put basically everything into XRP to the literal point of financial ruin. He called me yesterday and said "I have faith in you, your mother, your sister....and most of all....XRP". God is going to shit in him for his blasphemy, and he's been a reliable "shoeshin" boy. Everytime he comes to sell me on XRP it takes a massive dump. Lo and behold it dumpeth today.

62166364
>>62166333
checked. your father is going to heaven. God bless him and your family

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62166597
>>62166588
If anything I could be fucking tradies wives while they out bragging about their 12 hour shift and im at home in my underwear

62166641
>>62166597
Will everyone clap after?

62166651
>>62166266
idk I'm 26 mech E and I make like $90k a year which I feel is far above average for my age. Mechanical Engineering, like all engineering, is a very broad degree through so you can either make like $60k at a shit tier place, all the way up to like $200k+ for higher end positions.

62166652
>>62166588
>>62166641
You're getting uppity because a brown immigrant took your job

62166684
>>62166462
You're the same anon that kept spamming "checked" in the neet vs wagie thread. Why? Are you underage? Stop trolling.

62166693
>>62166651
What was your first job?

62166702
>>62166568
kek

62166722
>>62166693
I worked for about 2 years post graduation at an electronics repair place to get experience (I interned there over the summers while in school a few days a week). Didn't really make much there but after college I really just wanted to take some time off and figure out what field I wanted to go into long term. Then I got hired by a large company which is where I'm at now. I'll be honest I don't work very hard and I make good money, college was very difficult but worth it in the end.

62166746
>>62166722
Nice, if you had gone to EE you would've probably been miserable. I think you made the right choice

62166756
>>62166746
I specifically picked mechanical because of how broad the degree is and how many fields you can go into, its quite nice. I have heard there's more of a need for EEs right now but obviously that can change at any given time. I'm sure a ton of companies need EEs for all these data centers and such.

62166781
>>62166588
A man with a bad back and shot knees typed this post

62166814
>>62166781
Yea all the videos of fitness dudes vs accountants out there. Bitchmade fatass lmao

>>62166652
Not even a tradie. I just like them dudes. Also gloating about 3rd world quality infrastructure seems like a self burn.

62166829
>>62166464
>most of all I have faith I did my best to lay a financial foundation for my heirs
Is indeed very christian in spirit
You can sperg out about whether he minmaxxed the absolute peak option like other browns or just accept that he truly believed he did his best

62166840
>>62166814
fitness dudes aren’t what is implied by “tradies” lol
your blue collar iq is showing

62166857
>>62166840
Retard. They have videos of old construction dudes out lifting young "fitness" dudes. Youre comment was about bad knees. Working out is how you keep your shit together you rat soul lmao.

62166858
>>62166814
>absolutely bootie blasted
You'd be more mellow if you had a chill high paying job.

62166862
>>62166829
My dad is a pillhead nigger lover frankly. Muh daddy lmao

62166869
>>62166858
I personally stopped working when COVID hit because I'm not paying taxes for niggers. I just collect some gubment benefits and let you retards run the rat race lmao. You're the goodest goy though. Miss your foreskin too? Lmao

62166960
insecure normie thread
all of you blow your brains out

62167005
>>62166869
Lmao even in their Larps Tradies aren't tradies

62167007
>>62167005
>>62166960

62167049
>>62166266
Man, mechanical engineers make buck in my shithole country (mining). Lots of positions and way above average pay

62167057
>>62166504
yeah because 333 is a divine number

62167092
>>62166857
I do work out.
I have energy to because I’m not carrying bundles of lumber around or breathing in welding gases all day. Everybody knows tradie bodies are clapped out.
Post the videos “they have”.

62167093
>>62167005
>>62167007
Literally no counter. Dumbest, bitchest, faggot alive lmao

62167270
>>62167093
>>62167007
Better get to bed soon tradies. You got another 12 hour day tomorrow! Look I'll pack you a lunch LMAO

62167395
>>62167093
>>62167270
>>62166960

62167413
>>62166266
There's a lot of engineers that lack hustle. Like they're very good at completing assignments in front of them, but as far as actually meeting with people that'll get them a good job or doing something great they're sort of lackluster.

62167441
>>62167270
I should call her.

62167458
>>62167413
makes sense

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 102 replies — 59.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 102 • Updated: 2026-04-28 21:29 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160013
>>62159864
i don't think i even qualify

62162244
>>62159435
Of course i wouldn’t do it for free but i don’t work for the best possible pay either. There is s balance to it, and it skews heavily on meaningfulness of work instead of the pay.

62162251
>>62159425
This is just weak.

62162273
>>62159864
I noticed you wrote light bill and bragged about being on welfare. please post your hand.

62163096
>>62156775
Take trintellix 10mg it literally cured me I used to have real bad social anxiety and always wanting to fight with people going outside now I just feel chill and normal not stuck in my own head 24/7.


It will make your dick not work though

62163114
>>62156751
Working from home is boring as well, but at least I have money.

62163252
>>62156751
i hate working as much as being a neet
live is shit eitherway when poor and lonely
i just want to go back to school time

62163885
>>62156751
>it's so boring and depressing
Why aren't you doing stuff you like to do with your time? This shitty complaint is always a (You) problem that only the most boring, mindless cattle have.

62163908
>>62156751
A lot of the NEET propaganda is from autists who essentially can't function in normal circumstances and cope by seething about it. I feel for them, but they have to know it's retarded.
Mankind is built for working towards something. Even if you're rich, you can end up like Citzen Kane.

62164059
We can't all make it so shut up.

62164079
Creating need space. Like, I dunno, woodwork or building furniture or whatever.
You can't do that if you don't have a house. Living the NEETlife in a flat, even if a nice flat, is incredibly limiting. Not having a house limit the potential hobbies.

62164110
>>62156751
the NEET life is a perfect mirror.
if you are depressed and bored as a NEET, you are simply meant to be a slave.
There is nothing else to say.

62164118
>>62156795
this is the move, anon.
im an electrical engineering student and my plan is to take my intern cash and start a biz while working remote somewhere.
good luck

62164142
>>62156838
Let me guess, your hobbies are going on 4chan and masturbating

62164460
>NEETs when you ask them to show you some of the art and projects they "have time to create since they're not a slave like you"

62164470
>>62164460
i've beaten my favorite game nearly 5 times in the past month and wrote some genderbent DEI thot getting raped and mindbroken
how 'bout u?

62164922
>>62156751
simple i wasn't born a slave with a pink id

62165197
>>62164460
Is it so difficult to grasp why somebody who isn't compelled to conform to working their whole life is also not compelled to try and impress somebody who is?

62165794
>>62156775
yeah i never had a job because i keep sperging out in the few interviews i get

62165803
>>62164460
I just feel bad for their Mom's more than anything.

62165810
>>62157256
AI is based and does the stupid shit I don't want to do
sucks for the accountants that get left out, great for the ones that survive. Bookkeepers / entry level on suicide watch.

62166342
>>62156871
hobbies cost money

62166357
>>62164460
Why would I need to prove you how productive I am. I could rest an entire life and it wouldnt change much about the superiority of the NEET lifestyle.

62166361
>>62156751
Back when I was a neet many years ago I felt like such a god damn loser during the week when all the wagies were off waging. It was pretty bad for my psyche. Looking back those were some of the best days of my life. Especially when I had some good weed. Getting high, smoking cigs, and playing black ops. Fuck those were the glory days

62166616
>>62165197
>>62166357

62166678
>>62156751
>I'm bored with my infinite free time with infinite access to infinite materials online
Unironically kill yourself you worthless braindead carbon emitter
You were born to be a spineless barely sentient farm hand who does nothing but work and eat and die alone for someone else but you were born too late even for that

62166894
>>62158971

62166973
>>62166678
So I actually use the internet to achive productive things. Did research on drones and electric bikes. None of this matters if you have no money to follow through.

62167037
>>62163096
>cured me but dick no longer works
This is me with tramadol.

62167148
>>62164118
>electrical engineering student
unless you are working on boner inducing projects or at an ivy league, i suggest changing majors. these jeets are taking all the jobs

t. EE

item.title: Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition — 113 replies — 39.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition

Open thread • Replies: 113 • Updated: 2026-04-28 20:21 UTC

OP

Hello my fellow PolkaCurry brothers. We are again here, for another thread where we discuss everything related to DOT, Mumbai (the city of DOT), curry and more. The last thread was a resounding success, we managed to keep it alive for literally 41 days. We got paid 11500 + 5*150 = 12250 DOT for the thread and are now living in a period of enlightenment while eating with METAL spoons. Brothers, we have truly reached enlightenment. WE, the Mumbai Warriors will strike yet again and collect generations worth of money !

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Early replies (first 3)

62115437
We are eating with our METAL spoons in Mumbai. No more hands my brethren. We eat with out spoons, like proud warriors.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62115624
>>62115424
>>62115437

Still gonna larp as an Indian?

62115793
>>62115437

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62151325
>>62149307
Pssssstttttt Kamal. Do you want to eat with your hands again or do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat like true kings? With spoons? Young warrior Kamal, you have still much to learn.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62153932
100$ end of bull run

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62155237
My brothers... nirvana is near, it's just around the corner. Stack up on DOT right now or get priced out.

62156822
My Mumbai brethren. I've been informed that the Palk Strait will be closed by the Mumbai warriors. We will now toll all ships and they'll have to pay the toll in DOT.

62157778
>>62115424
Im tired

62158070
>>62157778
Good my brother. The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired. You first need to see your darkness in order for you to bring the light. Those who seek the light have experienced immense darkness. Brother, this is a moment of rejoice. Accept your pain, let it go, move on and forgive yourself or the people who have cause it. But remember brother the world is simply an illusion and by that I mean your own perception of reality. It's all inside you and not in the outside world. A river is not beautiful or magnificent, that's your illusion of it. A river is simply water that is moving, nothing more, nothing less. The illusion feels real because just like when you dream the pain feels real, the fear feels real, the sorrow feels real. Once you wake up from the dream you realize that nothing was real, that it was just an illusion. But it is true that when you were in the dream the pain felt real. So, once we see the illusion for what it is it'll start dissolving and once it dissolves that's then the reason to work inside the world without attachments and to help those who are asleep to wake up.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158170
>>62157778
>>62158070
>The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired.
And then the last step to enlightenment is to realize that there are no steps to enlightenment. It was always there. It was just covered by conditioning, traumas, the ego, ... . Once all of those dissolve it'll uncover enlightenment. So, enlightenment isn't an achievement or something you do, it's literally that you stop doing. It's the fact that the doer stops. The watcher and the watched go away. The only thing that remains is the watching.

62158427
>>
Metoo

62158494
>>62158427
... You forgot to green text young Vishnu mind of the block chain. You too what?

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158686
If you try to tell a person, "Hey bro, there's hope. You're not a loser. I have faith in you. I think you're a good person.", what do they do? They argue with you. They're defended against that. They intellectualize, "There may be hope for other people, but there's no hope for me.". Such a potent intellectual defense mechanism. And what are they defending against? The belief of hope. Because hope hurts. If there's zero chance, there's zero need for effort. See, human beings are really resilient. We can live through genocide and holocaust and all kinds of stuff. We can live through all kinds of terrible things, terrible economic times. We're survivors. But don't give us hope, because if we can hope, we can hurt.

Having hope also exposes you to hurt. And hurt is a normal part of life. If you're hurting that means you're human. It's just. Are you going to hurt consciously and change something or are you going to hurt unconsciously and keep on hurting due to the same thing for the rest of your life?

You maybe haven't "You go this" at the moment. You may feel powerless. You may feel down. And at the same time you'll slowly and gradually regain your power. You'll unburden the weight. Sooner or later you'll feel so light you'll start flying. I really believe that, even though it may at the current moment not feel like it. Even though you might feel like the current moment is never ending trust me, it'll all change and reshape into a healthier future. You got this fren who's reading this.

Your dear Vishnu Kumar wishes you are peaceful day. May Vishnu of the mindchain be with and all around you.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158906
>>62157778
metoo

62158991
>>62158906
That information helps a lot. Thank you for sharing. Now what do we do about that?

62159732
100$ end of bull run. No shot we miss nirvana


Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62161400
What is Gavin Wood up to right now?

62161427
>>62161400
He's back to being CEO of Parity. He also talks at the DOT conventions. He's also a part of the JAM development team. And sometimes he even writes some CP fanfiction to relieve the stress of being a full time awesome guy

62162193
>>62161427
Are you advocating CP?

62162631
>>62162193
Oh little Reyansh we all know you're craving it and are therefore asking. You hear what you want to hear.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162869
>>62162631
Holy shit you are

Jannies delete thread

62162938
>>62162869
Wow, another pedophile self-reporting.

CIA, get him. These two >>62162193 >>62162869 are basically begging for it.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162977
>>62162938
You advocated for it

Why support a pedo founded project

62163124
>>62162977
>You advocated for it
I did? How?

>Why support a pedo founded project
Because pedos run the world my young one. You have still much to learn. Gavin is running a CP ring. He is part of the ELITE and therefore DOT will make it because Gavin has the necessary pedo connections. They do call him the ephebophil of the mindchain, right? Do you genuinely believe that someone who isn't involved into this kind of stuff can do anything? Of course not young one. If you want to become part of the elite than you need to play like the big dogs. Human sacrifice and a bit of pedophilia goes a long way in these kind of circles. A bit of beef jerky here and there also never hurt anyone.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
The only thing I see is 3 people projecting their inner desires onto an external object. That's just how projection works. It's like this

Outside (Conscious mind): "I am confident" Vessel
o o
-|- |------------> -|-
/ \ | / \
Inside (Unconscious mind): "I am a loser" -----------|

I am just a vessel for you to offload your projection. It's like the pretty girl clique having an "ugly" chick in order to offload their insecurities onto her. Pretty girls consciously feel pretty but unconsciously feel ugly therefore they tend to have an ugly chick in order to offload that ugliness inside of them onto the ugly chick. Exactly what you 3 guys did just right now. You're consciously against pedophilia, because society has programmed you in that way, yet unconsciously you just want a piece of that 14yo meat. It is what it is guys. I don't judge you for it to be honest.

62163165
>>62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
See picrel. You can't indent on 4chan

62163202
>>62163165

>>62162869
>>62162977
>>62162193
Just like a bully believes he's "confident" but is actually unconsciously a "loser" and then beats other people in order to project that feeling into the external world you guys are also into CP while trying to accuse me, as an "easy" target, in order to externalize your inner conflict. Bros, it's ok. We can all see your urges. Funny how you 3 suddenly jumped on the band wagon while I didn't even say anything about it, right? Funny how your mind simply latched onto it, right? You 3 self-reported. You probably don't even know it yourself. It's like people who are heavily religious and are forbidden to be gay. And then because they're angry at themselves for hating themselves for being closet fags then they do what? They beat up gay people because they're jelaous someone else is openly gay while they hate themselves because they want to taste the forbidden fruit. Just admit it guys, you want to fuck 14yo, right? To be honest, just google "age of consent by country" and go to Italy if you really want to do that. The age of consent in Italy is 14yo therefore it's legal. You just can't film it and it's ok. Don't believe me? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Age_of_consent_by_country. Same goes for Germany. In Argentina it's legal to do it with a 13yo. Austria 14, Chile 14, Peru 14, Angola 14, Hungary 14, Panama 14, Serbia 14. Trinidad and Tobago 12. Bosnia 14, ... You get the jist. If you really want to pursue your inner desires you can LEGALLY do it. It's LEGAL in certain places and therefore it's ok, right? People are just programmed to demonize it, even though IT'S LEGAL in MANY COUNTRIES. You can literally have LEGAL CONSENSUAL SEX WITH A 14YO IN A LOT OF COUNTRIES. Just don't film it or pay for her and it's fine.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163228
>>62163202
I can feel the throbbing hard cocks and the drooling coming right through my screen while people are reading the message. You guys must be having wild fantasies at this point. You guys are fucking wild. I just gave you a guilt free pass to destroy that 14yo pussy in a legal and socially acceptable way. I just unleashed all hell. Let me guess? You three >>62162193, >>62162869 and >>62162977 are probably holding your throbbing dicks in your hands while buying tickets for Italy. You're already manifesting yourself balls deep inside a fine young 14yo Italian gypsy pussy. You 3 are fucking wild man. WILD. Fucking cinema to say the least. Self-reporting, hilarious.

62163243
>>62162193
>>62162869
>>62162977
I'm am just a mere vessel for you pedophilic desires which society has put under constraint. You're just externalizing your deepest wishes that lie in your shadow. It's time that Vishnu Kumar brings the light and shines upon thy. Once you understand that the pedophile is within there will be no more questions, only realization.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62166550
My Mumbai warriors. Soon it will be our time. Even the ones who are into CP, because obviously we have some cheese pizza connoisseurs in our ranks. It is alright guys. You can travel to Italy to indulge in the finest cheese pizza.

62166786
>>62115424
Oh dotsaars I don't feel good. I feel like a vegetarian vindaloo from a Bangladeshi dalit street vendor help me saars

62166911
>>62163165
>>62163202
>>62163228

You are one fucked up guy
And dont ask how. You know it

62166925
>>62166911
Help me understand. What did I say or do to make you think that?

>>62166786
Emotions go up and emotions go down. There's no up without the down. Just notice your emotional state and sit with it. It's trying to tell you something.

item.title: Saylor's STRC ponzi has been de-pegged for 11 days now... — 7 replies — 11.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Saylor's STRC ponzi has been de-pegged for 11 days now...

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-28 22:36 UTC

OP

Saylor's STRC ponzi has been de-pegged for 11 days now...

Early replies (first 3)

62166921
it's at a discount actually

62166929
>>62166917
*stretches your asshole*

62167230
>>62166929
kek

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167288
>>62166917
Just re-peg it.

62167330
>>62167288
Re-peg with what Michael?

62167344
Nobody want the Epstein pedo coin or its derivatives

62167431
>>62166917
Isn't that by design? The price is just the buffer that pays the yield when the coins are not pumping? Then once the price goes to zero it starts paying out of the reserve? Then in like 2 or 3 more years they have to start selling their bags? That's just what I remember from asking AI to explain it to me a few months ago.

item.title: I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS???? — 27 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-04-28 20:54 UTC

OP

I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Early replies (first 3)

62165377
>>62165360
Become an overnight security guard with a site in a rich area that’s internal (you’re inside a building).

The golden goose is MAG7 tech companies. I’ve literally and unironically done security for google. Max comfy

62165379
>>62165360
I do. I work like ~5 hours a day and play on my phone while eating a ton of corporate junk food and hitting on the co-workers for the rest. Must be a skill issue.

62165445
>>62165360
E Z ly
U just week

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165491
>>62165360
More like 45+ years.

62165614
>>62165360
Waging used to get you enough money to buy a house in a White area, get a foid and still have enough money left over to save. Now waging doesn't provide you enough to do any of that, so its pointless.

62165647
I've had it free seating in open landscapes, I'm switching from 90% office presence to 90% wfh.

62165675
>>62165360
When you become an adult and have to wage, you either become a soulless wagie husk, kill yourself, or become a NEET. That's what they don't tell you growing up. Life is a scam.

62165695
>>62165360
there's only 1 thing worse than being a wagie, and that's applying to be a wagie and being rejected

62165737
when I was young I'd get excited over changing the world with my ideas and becoming a big shot at my company
now I just wanna get out and retire ASAP
where did it all go wrong
I wonder how many of us are like this

62165765
>>62165360
>ugh i hate swimming how do people do this for x years instead of just drowning
you will look back at this point in time as relative golden age, affordable food, relative high trust, available work as a means to sustain yourself. you have no idea how bad its going to get.

62165773
>>62165360
I hate waging so much, it only becomes bearable when I take adderall and zap my brain, rendering me a soulless NPC. Rotting away in my little wage cage. Unfortunately (or maybe fortunately) this is not sustainable for 30+ years.

62165800
>>62165773
>>62165647
Oh yeah and you 100% need to secure a job that is at least 1 day minimum WFH per week (2 to further keep your sanity). I'd actually kill myself if I had to be in the office at 8am 5 days a week, that's not a life worth living.

62165806
>>62165737
>where did it all go wrong
when you realized that most "people" are not

62165808
>>62165360
The key is to lose hope. Once you lose hope it's easier to live in hell. That's a lesson I've learned from my waging years

62165811
>>62165360
I got rich on my own and then went to a government job for fun, prestige. Agreed.

Especially if you're not making bookoobucks it'd be soul crushingly hellish to earn baby money in some bleh position, a really significant amount that goes to paying for transportation, food and clothes specific to the office.

It's especially wild for women to do this shit in Jewish daycare when they could just stay home and between the not-commuting, the better home make meals

62165817
>>62165360
WFH at least hybrid solutions or fully remote, 40hr contracts MAX and 35hr ideal, im using 20hr+ a week to put into my own businesses and side hustles to supplement my income and eventually if fortunate enough replace my job.

62165830
>>62165377
What is the pay and bennies like? Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?

62165918
>>62165811
Women enjoy keeping society running.

62166277
>>62165811
Women on average are a bit less smart than men, but this means there is a giant glut of midwit women more than midwit men, and the midwits especially fall for Jewish and feminist talking points.

62166475
>>62165379
We have a room at work with big comfy chairs where we all sleep and watch movies, we work 13hrs but at the most actually go and do 3 hours of work.

62166487
>>62165830
>Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?
they're fucking retarded, anon

62166489
Wagies are spiritually unwell to do what they do. I pray for them nightly.

62166493
Their soul slowly erodes and they become hollow shells of who they used to be.

62166854
>>62165811
Being a SAHM is actually harder than doing nothing in the office all day.

>But what about the mind numbing boringness!

Remember women are great at socialization and finding things to talk about. Unlike a man who will become le office space women just find ways to get through the boredom. I'm not justifying their behavior, I just know that the average western woman isn't as tough as her ancestors 100+ years ago.

62166949
>>62165360
Idk. My job is really good and I’ve been doing it 15 years, the only job I’ve ever been able to do this long, and it’s still hell.

62166970
>>62166949
Same, my job is good for what it is. I've only been in the workforce for 5 years and I think I'm going to kill myself.

62167031
>>62165377
You’re essentially lower class.
>>62165806
When you realize 99% of people are born to work.

item.title: Is 300k at 30 y/o enough to NEET retire? — 27 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is 300k at 30 y/o enough to NEET retire?

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-04-28 20:54 UTC

OP

>24 years old warehouse wagie
>go to work
>go to gym after (hit 2 plate bench milestone a long while ago, lean af, get mired)
>come home, cook, meditate, read, sleep
>minimalist and don't really spend a dime on shit, live with parents rent-free
>no friends, no online friends, no girlfriend, no masturbation, no socializing, no unnecessary spending, no parties, no drugs/alcohol, no fashion, no fastfood/junk, nothing
>have 130k saved up so far, 100k of that invested
So I'm planning to stack up every single penny of my paycheck and I reckon I'd have 300k-500k by 30 years old. I kinda just wanna NEET and chill at my moms basement while my money works for me in the background, then in 10 years time when the 300k becomes a mill I can fully retire with autonomy. I plan on continuing mastering myself without having to adroitly balance a full-time job. I've also transcended most normans in mental and physical acuity so it's quite literally impossible to interact with them in any meaningful capacity; my fulfillment is independent of their proximity. I'm already at the point of my spirituality where indulging in lust has serious palpable physical drawbacks and lethargy (and it's not placebo, I've experimented). So even when I retire there won't be any exorbitant expenses attributed to marriage, kids, travelling, etc.. Also gonna shave my head so no barber. Aside from mastering my ninjutsu when I NEET, as a pass time I'll stick to old vidya / ROM hacks for mastery purposes, so no splurge on ultra normie triple A titles and new consoles/PCs. Can I pull it off?

Early replies (first 3)

62162036
Yes with your lifesytle easily. But that lifestyle is better in SEA, we are tropical animals.

62162053
you need to know what your yearly costs are, expected annual returns, then factor in the odds of some negative years. in general you need a lot more money than a few hundred thousand to be able to live off of. with as young as you are, you wouldn’t really want to spend the principal.

62162057
>>62162013
Take the south/central America pill over the SEAmonkey pill

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62162076
>>62162013
150k at 25 is fucking insane for your age
I'm 25 and I barely have 15k NW

62162082
>>62162013
Anyone in here that tells you this is a nice life hasn't made it. It's hell on earth depressing and stressful as fuck neeting on low 6 figs. Grind out to 700k+ and then relax, I almost killed myself neeting with only like 400k in the bank cash

62162102
>>62162013
if you invest it right you can NEET at 35-40

62162107
>>62162013
You sound autistic as hell

62162108
>work in warehouse
>anime
>virgin who's never known love
>mentally transending anything
You've got a lot to learn lil buddy. 1 mil in 10 years won't buy you much

62162208
>>62162082
Even 700k isn't enough though pretty close. You either keep it in cash and lose purchasing power or keep it in risk assets and risk the bubble bursting.
Going half half is the worst of both worlds with such an amount

62162214
nice blog

62162224
>>62162082
>>62162208
>>62162053
I'm sure some kinda shitty kinda not-so-shitty studio apartment can be comfortably rented out off the dividends from a 700k+ portfolio.. right? And even worst case scenario I run out of dough, by the age I do I'd probably qualify for some government gibs

62162380
>>62162013
I have 300k at 29, and it feels like nothing. Do I just buy a 600k house or something?

62163303
>>62162013
if you save in bitcoin I'd say you have a chance to make it

62163883
>>62162013
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62163915
>>62162013
Sure, just go all in on a leveraged AI-bubble ETF with ALL that money and hold it until the bubble actually pops. MU probably still has growth, but SNDK has had the most growth of all. Get into SNXX. SNDU closed slightly higher than 2x, but I don't know why. Meanwhile, panic dips will generally resolve themselves within a month.
Kishi's Sasuke wank was bullshit, btw. You are not cool or edgy for avatarfagging with retard like that. 'Oh! What's that? You collected the eyes of almost the entirety of my dead clan? I guess I should trust you!'

62163916
> no friends, no online friends, no girlfriend, no masturbation, no socializing, no unnecessary spending, no parties, no drugs/alcohol, no fashion, no fastfood/junk, nothing

Wtf monk mode, i hate monk and begging with moral teachings

62163953
>>62162013
You can neet with 300k but you'll have to move to eastern Europe, or South East Asia

62164001
>>62163953
Where in EE can you retire with 300k? You would need to live like a minimum wage local, and you certainly don't want that.
Even in SEA 300k is not enough, considering the skin tax

62164077
300k in the west is fuck all
You can probably live for 5-10 years with our inflation rate

You can probably manage a frugal lifestyle in SEA or south Europe however

62164083
>>62162013
I think so provided inflation doesn't go too high and your investments generate a good return. 400k is my goal for living on my own. If I can reach that, then I can neet passively, though I'd still actively trade to attain more wealth. Right now 200k is my goal as that should likely calm my parent's from worrying about me being a neet in their house. I should be able to invest/gamble up to 400k in such a situation.

62164104
Those are rookie numbers. You need 3 million to retire at 30.

62164670
>>62162013
why don't you just reduce your hours at work instead of going full neet? just half your hours and see how you feel.

62164709
>>62164001
What I mean is you still have to let that 300k work for you, find some kind of investment to grow it. But you can do this more comfortably in a cheap country and you'll have to take less risks.

62164935
>>62162013
>in 10 years time when the 300k becomes a mill
Why wait for that when for a cumulative few days of your life you could do the research needed to 10x this? You don't even need to go all in with 300k. I've found dips/low price stuff that turned around with enough force to turn 1-5K into millions. Did not even do grade 12 math. Just keep an eye out for opportunity.

62164971
>>62162076
It depends on the inflation and value of your NW. If you're not from America, assets are usually valued at 50% less. So if you have 3 houses in South Asia or Latin America, that's just around 60k NW. In America, that would be around 150k NW.

62165000
>>62164971
I made a mistake. That would be 60k EACH and 150k Each, not in three houses.

62167028
>>62162013
nahhh keep waging and apply to higher paying jobs. take care of your parents pay off their home and bills etc etc. you don't wanna be stuck with a dementia weight around your neck. as long as you keep your family healthy you should be working so you can neet it up. You should read some gene wolfe and philosophy books because their comfy af. For vidya get you an analogue pocket and deck for TV output or an ick eck. I'm 40 or something and paid off my moms house but she got diagnosed with dementia and it fucking sucks ass. You never know what's going to happen and you can't account for retard economy shit deflating everything. Remember to diversify your portfolio and depending on the size of your home property get you some chickens. Free eggs, free chicken meat. Yeah man pulling it off isn't impossible but you should try and earn more when your younger. You can actually escape and if you ever left the country and can stay away from vices even 300K will be retirement full time in like SEA monkey land but everyone will try and suck you off and get you to drink with them.

item.title: boy am i glad i didnt fall for the blue collar meme >20 days vacation >10 sick days >11 public holidays >wfh 2 days a we… — 32 replies — 10.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
boy am i glad i didnt fall for the blue collar meme >20 days vacation >10 sick days >11 public holidays >wfh 2 days a we…

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-04-28 20:10 UTC

OP

boy am i glad i didnt fall for the blue collar meme

>20 days vacation
>10 sick days
>11 public holidays
>wfh 2 days a week
>40 hours a week MAX

who here /comfy wagie/

Early replies (first 3)

62159605
>>62159597
That doesn't mean anything to the Wagie, they do it for the humiliation of it all not the money or benefits.

62159615
>>62159597
>>62159605
Laborers fuck up their body's, are always tired after work, and get fat after 30. You're also immediately known to be low class

62159618
>>62159615
these plebs survive on gas station goyslop

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62159632
>>62159597
give me ur job please i want a nice do nothing six fig white collar job

but instead im a cursed NEET

62159638
>>62159618
Anon, you're telling me, energy drinks, Big AZ burgers and smoking/vaping makes you look like shit?

62159649
>>62159597
Remote work too if your company doesn't suck. I love my comfy office job. For some reason, blue collars love to brag how much overtime they work, as if it's something to be proud of. And yet some of them still seem poor.

62159662
>>62159649
blue collar is only recommended if you are an iq-let

62159679
>>62159597
We don't want you in the trades either. Your thin skinned ass wouldn't "get" the manly jokes and pranks we do while doing real work.

62159687
>>62159618
>>62159638

62159730
>>62159597
>>62159679
we don’t want you in the trades either. you’d be running to hr the first time someone jokes around in the warehouse, you wouldn’t last a day around it this aint disneyland, princess. we joke around hard out on the warehouse floor haha

62159794
>>62159615
>>62159679
>>62159730
Not working anything but jews hat blue collar workers. Even a certain german politician would notice this

62159985
thank you for your service

62163583
>>62159597
6 months neet here

62163588
>>62159597
$150k, fully remote, 22 days PTO + 11 company holidays, half day fridays from memorial day to labor day.

62163622
>>62159679
kek tradies have to plow each other because all the females are in white collar office spaces

62163863
>>62159597
I love how many men fell for the trades meme during the Biden years because some Boomer/grifter/Boomer grifter who doesn't even work a trade told them it was good money only to realize how fucking bad they are. That "good money" is maybe $85k that you'll make ONLY if you're working large amount of OT.
>earn while you learn!
Nobody teaches you shit and your "learning" experiences come in the form of last second requests to do something you have no idea about

>t. Worked a trade for 4.5 years, quit, and got an analyst job.

62163932
>>62163863
how did you switch careers?

62163966
>>62159615
Sorta. If you don't drink like a nigger and eat decent you stay way healthier than the fat fuck desk workers. And your dick works.

62163975
>>62163932
He has never actually worked a trade

62164000
>>62163932
I quit one career and went to another. Granted, this was before this current nigger job market so I supposed luck played into it a bit.

>>62163975
Except I did?

62164931
I’m on my 15th year of doing commercial hvac. Were union, so the pay and benefits are good. We get to take our vans home and we have a company phone, all paid for. Dynamic work environment. Work alone most of the time. Micromanaging almost non existent. Flexible work schedule. Just name some of the pros.

Sure there are cons to it as well like anything else but some of those are non issues (you might sweat from time to time…). Guys who have been here as long or longer than me aren’t using walkers to get around. We’re all perfectly fit. There are tools for every job. The ‘broken body’ issue is a meme from people who never worked in the field or are hurting themselves. That goes for pipefitters, construction workers, etc. companies get away with shitty work environments because workers put up with it. I hate waging, period, but it’s the best thing I found so far. The sooner I can stop the better though

62165179
>>62159597
True words.

Anyone who's ever worked blue collar job understands that the real money is in operating a business (roofing, plumbing company, etc), not in the labor itself. Being self-employed blue collar or even employed blue collar will always keep you in the low income category or middle income at best.

It is just a psyop to further push down the cost of blue collar labor since unlike white collar work, it is hard to automate with AI. The value of physical, blue-collar work will be pushed down further as many people ditch white collar and try to move into blue-collar jobs due to AI automation, further pushing down the value of physical blue-collar labor.

Let the blue-collar goyim deal in the real world.

62165334
>>62164000
>Except I did?
You really didn't anon. Let's be honest

62165619
>>62159597
Why do you have so few vacation days?

>32 days vacation
>11 public holidays
>if a public holiday falls on a weekend, you get another day of vacation to choose freely
>WFH 20 hours per week
>40 hours a week, flexible schedule

62165627
>>62159597
>>62165619
Also what the hell is a sick day? You're sick, you stay home. What else are you supposed to do? Doctor's note if it's more than 3 days obviously

62165628
>>62159632
How?Just get a warehouse job, work a few years and then get a forklift cert
Easy 50 - 60k a year

62165640
>>62159649
they give all their $$ to their wives so it all disappears forever

62165955
>>62159597
Not longer than two years I swear.

62166200
>>62163966
Nothing sorta about it. Tradecels all get fat in their 30s. They break their bodies for mediocre pay.

62166450
>>62165334
Whatever you say.

62166879
>>62159687
Amazing how almost everything in the store has bioengineered food ingredients. What happened? All the goyslop on the shelves didn't have this in the 80s or 90s or at the very least, didn't have the label that said it contained the bioengineered ingredients. And by the way, what even are these ingredients? Could they not put an easily identifiable symbol near the listed ingredients to point out which ones were "natural"?

62166886
>>62159615
In America money IS class.

item.title: rugged by cheese on both SOL and ETH — 6 replies — 8.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
rugged by cheese on both SOL and ETH

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-28 22:31 UTC

OP

rugged by cheese on both SOL and ETH

Early replies (first 3)

62167268
>>62167259
Think about it as charity! Some poo(r) kumar can afford toilet papers now(they wont, but he could)

62167311
>>62167268
Saaaar the ganges river is my toilet paper

62167319
YOU FUCKING IDIOT

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167338
thats kinda embarassing ngl

62167402
SAY CHEEBE

item.title: Can't even get interviews at $40k jobs — 15 replies — 7.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Can't even get interviews at $40k jobs

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-28 21:15 UTC

OP

I previously came from an $80k job. Over 300 applications since late last year.
> just keep trying bro, just keep applying bro
> I don't see you getting interviews bro you're only putting in 10% effort bro you're supposed to make job searching your full time job bro
I'M FUCKING TRYING OK FUCK THIS IS SO UNFAIR!!!!!!!!!!!!
> just adjust your resume to each job
DONE THAT ALREADY BUT DOESN'T DO SHIT

Early replies (first 3)

62166038
Brutal no reply pill, it's truly truly over for real this time.

62166368
>>62165989
same bro im at 350 applications with one interview

I tried walking into retail stores and trying to get an interview and they all say apply online. I apply online and get ghosted by mcdonalds let alone helldesk entry level jobs

62166375
>>62165989
>>62166368
Unironically just keep trying and never give up.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62166382
>>62166375
thats the plan but this fucking sucks lol. I am currently working on getting my CCNA and im also doing labs in oracle box to get some more knowledge on linux and server stuff

we will see i guess

62166386
>>62165989
The whole point of AI was to REPLACE people, you goose. That's where the value lies, not augmenting them.

62166580
>>62165989
300 is the floor, not the ceiling. Get to work.

62166619
I got 5 interviews from maybe like 75 applications.

62166633
it is very demoralizing. the only advice I’d have is to make use of whatever personal connections you have. if a former coworker got a job somewhere else, apply there and try to use them as a reference. if an old classmate works somewhere, apply there and do the same. those are things that will set you apart from the hundreds of other people applying for the same role.

62166875
>>62165989
This is how it is now.
Connections are everything.
It's not what you know but who you know.
Hard work and merit mean nothing.
Only connections and nepotism.

62167016
>be me
>quit 5 years ago to work on own programming projects
>fail to make a proper income from it
>say fuck it
>google c++ jobs in my city
>one looks interesting
>send application
>have to do stupid coding test
>invited for interview
>get job
Maybe just learn c++?

62167024
>>62166375
nigger world

62167036
>>62167016
> has employment gap of 5 years
> sends ONE job application within the fucking CS field of all things and gets an interview+job offer
You need to try a little bit harder on your larp next time.

62167041
>>62166875
I'm NEET and the one job I ever had (in 2011) was because someone at an autism charity knew someone hiring. I never actually applied.

62167042
>>62166875
as someone who has had a very easy time landing jobs because of my Dad's engineering connections i can second this. The only reason I'm in electrical engineering right now is because of the connections i knew i'd have. Many people don't realize this is how the world is and will always be from now on.

62167097
I hate my job and it's low paid, shit like this makes me wary of quitting though as jobs seem harder to get now and it took me ages to get this one years ago.

>>62166375
and bee yourself

item.title: UAE quits OPEC — 19 replies — 6.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
UAE quits OPEC

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-28 20:03 UTC

OP

Can one of our in house oil investors explain the consequences of such a move and share the calculations and graphs they made in advance for such an event unfolding to justify their original investment.

Early replies (first 3)

62165070
I don't know shit but if they're quitting OPEC it must be because they want to produce more than OPEC agreed to. They could always produce less, OPEC wouldn't mind. So bearish for oil, a little bit?
Or am I retarded

62165079
nothingburger

62165082
>>62165059
it's so over

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165096
>>62165070
UAE currently needs to or rather even can export more oil?
But long term definitely bearish unless this is seen as greater instability in the gulf region.

62165408
>>62165059
Short term it changes nothing.

62165597
>>62165059
>Since the 1980s, OPEC has had a limited impact on world oil-supply and oil-price stability, as there is frequent cheating by members on their commitments to one another
KEK
non-white people really are a plague aren't they?

62165715
>>62165597
I would like to figure out

62165721
>>62165597
Yes

62165724
>>62165597
>non-white people really are a plague aren't they?
Says the white anglo jew who behaves like a pirate thug.

62165763
>>62165597
Every OPEC meeting is exactly the fucking same
>"Okay everybody, there's too much oil supply and prices are too low, we all agree to cut to raise the price of oil, right?”
>"Of course!"
>*Everyone goes back home*
>"Those dipshits fell for it hook line and sinker, now we can raise production while everyone else cuts there's"
>All OPEC countries raise production
>Rinse and repeat forever

62165809
>>62165724
White Anglo Saxon men are talking. Be quiet and listen

62165957
>>62165059
are they even producing or exporting anything after the attacks from iran?

62166011
>>62165724
Hello jamboy

62166086
what's with amerimutts always pretending to be "whilte" and victims?

62166249
>>62165763
It's funny qaddafi tried to save these goatfuckers and instead he got kabob'd
There will only be peace in the middle east when ALL the semites are gone it seems, including the long nosed elephants in the room

62166332
ummah bros...

62166465
>>62165597
Ok rabbi.

62166471
>>62165809
>>62166011
>By 2050, +50% of Americans will be hispanic
BYE BYE BYE.

62166851
>>62165059
Sounds like very bad news for US shale drillers
